creator: doubs.spellbind731@passinbox.com
text:
I am looking to install OPNsense or PFsense on the SimpleWAN Advanced 2 but neither explicitly state it's supported, though I have documentation clarifying that it does meet the system requirements.

Regardless, with the file linked this device is pretty capable and is almost running compleate standard hardware. It's on the slightly older side but if it does the job it shouldn't matter.
So, what I am looking for is to see how I can get known compatability for this or how I can get it into the compatable list. I would rather not waste perfectly good hardware.

I hope I am reporting this issue in the right location because both the above repositories seem to link back here for hardware documentation and compatibility. I tried to follow the guidlines best I can, sorry if I missed something.
